4 Section 8.3 Labelling of non-retail containers 
Information for non-retail containers shall be given either on the container or in accompanying documents, except that the name of the product, lot identification, and the name and address of the manufacturer, packer, distributor or importer, as well as storage instructions, shall appear on the container. However, lot identification, and the name and address of the manufacturer, packer, distributor or importer may be replaced by an identification mark, provided that such a mark is clearly identifiable with the accompanying documents. The labelling of non-retail containers should be in accordance with the General Standard for the Labelling of Non-Retail Container of Foods (CXS 346-2021).

sections.title: STANDARD FOR DRIED THYME

STANDARD FOR DRIED THYME
level=1
CXS 328-2017  
Adopted in 2017. Amended in 2021, 2022.

sections.title: SCOPE
sections.text: This standard applies to dried thyme offered for direct consumption, as an ingredient in food processing or for repackaging if required. It excludes dried thyme intended for industrial processing.

sections.title: Product definition
sections.text: Dried thyme is the product prepared from leaves/flowers of Thymus spp. of Lamiaceae family reached appropriate degree of development for processing; and processed in an appropriate manner, undergoing operations such as cleaning, drying, rubbing, and milling.

sections.title: Styles
sections.text: Dried thyme may be offered in one of the following styles: a) Whole/Intact. b) Crushed/Rubbed: processed into varying degrees ranging from a coarse to fine crush. c) Ground: processed into powders.

sections.title: Odour, flavour and colour
sections.text: Dried thyme shall have a characteristic odour and flavour according to the chemical components of the volatile oil (such as thymol, carvacrol, and linalool), which can vary depending on geo-climatic factors/conditions. Dried thyme shall be free from any foreign odour or flavour and especially from mustiness. Dried thyme shall have a characteristic colour varying from green ash to brownish grey.

sections.title: Classification of “defectives”
sections.text: A lot sample that fails to meet one or more of the applicable quality requirements, as set out in Section 3.2 (except those based on sample averages), should be considered as a “defective”.

level=1

page_spans.text: A lot sample that fails to meet one or more of the applicable quality requirements, as set out in Section 3.2 (except those based on sample averages), should be considered as a “defective”.

sections.title: Lot acceptance
sections.text: A lot should be considered as meeting the applicable quality requirements referred to in Section 3.2 when the number of “defectives”, as defined in Section 3.3, does not exceed the acceptance number of the appropriate sampling plan. For factors evaluated on a sample average, a lot will be considered acceptable if the average meets the specified tolerance, and no individual sample is excessively out of tolerance.

pages.title: STANDARD FOR DRIED THYME
pages.summary: A página apresenta o título principal do documento, uma seção dedicada à '2022 Amendment' e um bloco textual relacionado a 'Page' contendo orientações sobre rotulagem de embalagens não comerciais. Não há numeracão clara de seções, mas títulos em caixa alta foram considerados nível 1. O texto foi associado corretamente a cada título. Não há indicações de continuidade entre páginas.

A página apresenta cabeçalho padrão 'CXS 328-2017 2' e não possui título principal de documento visível. Foram identificadas três seções principais numeradas (SCOPE, DESCRIPTION, ESSENTIAL COMPOSITION AND QUALITY FACTORS) com seus respectivos subtítulos numerados hierarquicamente até nível 3. O texto foi associado adequadamente a cada título e não há continuidade entre páginas.

A página apresenta cabeçalho repetitivo 'CXS 328-2017 3' sem título principal visível. Foram identificadas seções e subseções numeradas hierarquicamente do nível 1 ao 3, com textos associados de acordo com a estrutura. A hierarquia segue o padrão de numeração para as seções e seus subtítulos, com ausência de continuidade entre esta página e outras.

Página com cabeçalho repetitivo 'CXS 328-2017 4'. Identificadas seções numeradas nas hierarquias 1 a 3: 8.2.4 Inspection mark (optional) (continuação), 8.3 Labelling of non-retail containers (continuação), 9 METHODS OF ANALYSIS AND SAMPLING, e uma seção sem numeração intitulada NOTES. Textos associados a cada título foram assim atribuídos. Marcação apropriada de continuidade para 8.2.4 e 8.3 indicando continuidade da página anterior.
